items.title: Badly burned British couple rescued from ravine during Spain wildfires
items.dek: The unnamed pair were found semi-conscious with 40% burns after being trapped by the blazes raging through Almeria province.
items.body: The unnamed pair were found semi-conscious with 40% burns after being trapped by the blazes raging through Almeria province.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: People flee as Russian strike hits near Ukraine coffee shop
items.dek: Three cameras caught the moment people ducked then ran for cover in Sumy, in north eastern Ukraine.
items.body: Three cameras caught the moment people ducked then ran for cover in Sumy, in north eastern Ukraine.
